hub.title: Advanced tools
hub.subtitle: You'll rarely need to visit this page day to day.
hub.auditText: Full history of system actions and sent communications.

assessmentFields.text: Customize the patient Assessment fields (each clinic defines its own).

personalize.text: Everything you define your way (assessment, forms, services, branding) in one place.

forms.title: Forms

patientSections.title: Chart sections

profile.title: My profile
profile.subtitle: Update your login details.
profile.emailHint: A confirmation will be sent to the new address.
profile.emailSent: Confirmation sent to the new email.

regional.title: Regional
regional.subtitle: Clinic default timezone and currency.
regional.cardDesc: Affects how dates, times and amounts are displayed across the platform.

usage.title: Usage and limits
usage.subtitle: Track your current plan limits and your clinic's real usage.
usage.noClinic: Clinic not set up. Complete onboarding to see usage data.

lgpd.title: Privacy & data protection
lgpd.subtitle: Manage patient data deletion requests (right to be forgotten).

security.title: Security
security.helper: Row Level Security status and two-factor authentication.

mfa.title: Two-factor authentication (2FA)
mfa.active: Active — your account is protected with TOTP.
mfa.inactive: Add an extra layer of security to your login.
mfa.setupDesc: Scan the QR code with Google Authenticator, Authy or similar. Then enter the generated code.

equipe.subtitle: Manage clinic members, roles and invites.
equipe.infoPractitionerDesc: — sees only their own schedule and patients seen
equipe.infoFrontDeskDesc: — schedule and patients, no financial data

practitioners.subtitle: Configure each team practitioner's public profile. Enable "Public schedule" so patients can choose the practitioner when booking online.
practitioners.emptyDesc: Invite team members by email. Once they accept the invite, they appear here for public profile setup.
practitioners.bioPlaceholder: Short introduction shown on the public booking page.
practitioners.bookableLabel: Appears on the public schedule (online booking)

sessionTypes.title: Session types
sessionTypes.subtitle: Manage modalities, durations and prices. Enable "Online" to create a Zoom meeting automatically.
sessionTypes.count: {count, plural, one {# type registered} other {# types registered}}
sessionTypes.name: Name
sessionTypes.onlineHint: Online session — creates a Zoom meeting automatically
sessionTypes.emptyHint: Click "+ New type" to get started.
sessionTypes.confirmDelete: Remove "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
sessionTypes.explainer: Types with Online enabled create a Zoom meeting automatically when booked — as long as Zoom is connected in Settings → Integrations. In-person types do not generate a Zoom link.

offers.title: Offers & packages
offers.subtitle: Create session packages, monthly plans and courses. Active offers appear in the patient portal.
offers.count: {count, plural, one {# offer registered} other {# offers registered}}
offers.name: Name
offers.descriptionPlaceholder: Details visible in the patient portal…
offers.emptyHint: Click "+ New offer" to create packages and plans.
offers.confirmDelete: Remove the offer "{name}"? This action cannot be undone.
offers.infoTip: Active offers are visible in the Patient Portal and can be sold directly. Disable an offer to hide it without deleting its sales history.

integrations.title: Integrations
integrations.subtitle: Sync appointments with your calendar and video conferencing.
integrations.zoomDesc: Creates a Zoom meeting automatically when booking an appointment.
integrations.zoomConnectedMsg: Configured via environment variables — meetings created automatically for online sessions.
integrations.icalDesc: Subscribable .ics feed — works in any calendar app.
integrations.nfseDesc: Issue service invoices directly from AXIEL.
integrations.hotmartDesc: Syncs course and digital product purchases with clinic patients.
integrations.reviewsDesc: Satisfied patients (rating ≥ 4) automatically receive the link via WhatsApp.
integrations.googleSetup: Google Calendar: Create a project at console.cloud.google.com → Enable the Google Calendar API → OAuth2 credentials → add {appUrl}/api/integrations/google/callback as the redirect URI → save GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID and GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET on Vercel.
integrations.zoomSetup: Zoom: Create an OAuth app at marketplace.zoom.us → OAuth app → Redirect URL: {appUrl}/api/integrations/zoom/callback → save ZOOM_CLIENT_ID and ZOOM_CLIENT_SECRET on Vercel.
integrations.zoomOwnCredsDesc: Create a Server-to-Server OAuth app at marketplace.zoom.us and paste the credentials below.
integrations.zoomConfirmRemove: Remove Zoom credentials from this clinic?
integrations.reviewHint: Paste the Google review link (find it in Google Business Profile → Get review link). Patients with a rating ≥ 4 will receive this link via WhatsApp automatically.
integrations.growthDesc: Receives hot leads captured and nurtured by AXIEL Growth.
integrations.growthEndpointLabel: Endpoint URL (enter this in AXIEL Growth)
integrations.growthKeyOnce: Copy now — the key is shown only once:
integrations.growthHint: Paste the generated key and the endpoint URL into AXIEL Growth's settings. When a lead gets hot, Growth sends it to Core automatically.

hotmart.title: Hotmart
hotmart.subtitle: Sync Hotmart course and digital product purchases with clinic patients. When someone buys, the record is created automatically and a welcome message is sent.
hotmart.step1: In the Hotmart dashboard, go to Tools → Webhooks.
hotmart.step2: Click Add new webhook and paste the URL below.
hotmart.step3: Copy the hottok generated by Hotmart and paste it in the field below.
hotmart.webhookDesc: Paste this address into the Hotmart dashboard.
hotmart.tokenDesc: Found in the Hotmart dashboard when creating the webhook. Ensures only Hotmart can trigger this endpoint.
hotmart.tokenConfigured: Token configured. Paste a new one to replace it.
hotmart.tokenPlaceholder: Paste the hottok generated by Hotmart

nfse.title: NFS-e · NFe.io
nfse.subtitle: Configure your NFe.io account to issue service invoices directly from AXIEL.
nfse.apiConfigDesc: Data is stored securely and used only to issue invoices on your behalf.
nfse.hiw1: Create an account at app.nfe.io and register your company
nfse.hiw2: Copy your API Key and Company ID and paste them in the fields above
nfse.hiw3: Go to Finance → NFS-e and issue invoices per payment or manually
nfse.hiw4: The PDF becomes available for download once the city processes it
nfse.cityCodeHint: Check the city's list. Healthcare: usually 1.05

branding.subtitle: Customize your clinic's logo and color on the patient portal and booking page.
branding.logoDesc: PNG, SVG, JPEG or WebP — transparent background recommended. Max 2 MB. Appears on the patient portal and booking page.
branding.colorDesc: Used in the patient portal header and on the booking page.
branding.taglineDesc: Phrase shown in the footer of every PDF report (Neuro ID 360) sent to the patient.
branding.taglinePlaceholder: e.g. TRUE MOVEMENT ARISES FROM THE FLOW OF YOUR IDENTITY
branding.errFormat: Invalid format. Use PNG, SVG, JPEG or WebP.

lembretes.title: Automatic reminders
lembretes.subtitle: Control which automatic messages are sent to patients via WhatsApp and email after booking.
lembretes.rowConfirmationDesc: Sent as soon as the session is created
lembretes.pushDesc: Get browser alerts when patients send messages or new actions are created.

whatsapp.title: WhatsApp Bot
whatsapp.subtitle: Configure the WhatsApp assistant for your clinic.
whatsapp.checklistDesc: Complete the 3 steps below for the bot to start replying automatically.
whatsapp.step1Title: 1. Fill in and save the configuration below
whatsapp.step1Desc: Clinic name, specialty, prices, Twilio number and/or Meta Phone Number ID.
whatsapp.step2aTitle: 2a. Twilio — add environment variables on Vercel
whatsapp.twilioWebhookLabel: Webhook URL for the Twilio Console:
whatsapp.step2bTitle: 2b. Meta WhatsApp API — add variables on Vercel
whatsapp.step2bDesc: Go to Meta for Developers → your App → WhatsApp → API Setup:
whatsapp.metaWebhookLabel: Meta webhook callback URL (configure in WhatsApp → Configuration → Webhook):
whatsapp.botActive: ✓ Bot active — replying to messages automatically.
whatsapp.twilioNumberHint: Twilio channel (legacy). Leave blank if using only the Meta API.
whatsapp.metaPhoneIdHint: Numeric ID of the number in Meta for Developers → WhatsApp → API Setup. Required for the Meta API channel.
whatsapp.metaInstagramIdHint: Instagram Business Account ID. Required for the bot to reply to this clinic's Instagram DMs.
whatsapp.programDesc: Describe what the patient receives. The bot presents this in Step 4.
whatsapp.pricingDesc: Add the cities you serve and the plans available in each.
whatsapp.noCities: No locations added. Click "+ Add city" above.
whatsapp.extraDesc: Clinic-specific rules, custom tone of voice or extra information for the bot.
whatsapp.extraPlaceholder: e.g. Always mention that appointments are in person. Don't book on Sundays.

voice.title: AI calls
voice.subtitle: The AI answers calls automatically, speaks Portuguese and English, and uses the same persona configured in the WhatsApp Bot.
voice.howDesc: Every call received on the Twilio number is answered by the AI using your clinic's sales flow.
voice.howStep3Desc: GPT-4 replies in real time, max. 2 sentences at a time
voice.langDesc: The language is set by the WhatsApp Bot configuration ("Bot language" field).
voice.activateDesc: Unlike WhatsApp (sandbox), calls require a dedicated Twilio voice number.
voice.aStep1Title: Buy a voice number on Twilio
voice.aStep1Desc: In the Twilio Console: Phone Numbers → Manage → Buy a number. Filter by "Voice" and choose a Brazilian (+55) or US (+1) number.
voice.aStep2Title: Configure the webhook on the purchased number
voice.aStep2Desc: In the Console: Phone Numbers → Manage → Active Numbers → click the number → Voice & Fax → "A call comes in". Select Webhook, method POST, and paste the URL:
voice.afterDesc: Call the purchased number — the AI will answer immediately using the persona and sales flow configured in WhatsApp Bot.
voice.personaDesc: The AI on calls uses exactly the same configuration as the WhatsApp Bot (name, specialty, methodology, prices). To change what it says, edit it in Settings → WhatsApp Bot.

clinicalTests.title: In-person clinical tests
clinicalTests.subtitle: Set up the battery of tests your clinic runs in sessions. They show up ready to fill on the session screen.
clinicalTests.label: Test battery
clinicalTests.empty: No tests in the catalog yet.
clinicalTests.errorSave: Could not save. Please try again.

supplements.title: Supplement catalog
supplements.subtitle: What your clinic offers (BR compounded formula and US purchase links).
supplements.name: Name

assessmentFields.title: Assessment fields
assessmentFields.subtitle: Define the fields in the patient's Assessment panel. Each clinic has its own.
assessmentFields.name: Field name
assessmentFields.groupHelp: Which block of the chart the field appears in.

personalize.title: Customize my clinic
personalize.subtitle: Everything you shape your way, gathered in one place.

patientSections.title: Patient chart sections
patientSections.subtitle: Set the order and which sections appear on the patient chart. Applies clinic-wide.
patientSections.dragHint: Drag by the handle to change the order. Use "Hide" to remove a section from the chart.
